overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing a hooded protagonist running through a historic Middle Eastern city during golden hour. The character navigates through stone archways, busy market squares, and narrow streets lined with mud-brick buildings, palm trees, and fabric awnings.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city street approaching stone archway

events.description: passing through the large stone archway into the inner city

agents.ego_description: running steadily through the sandy street toward a large decorative stone archway

notable_agents.action: two robed figures walking near the archway entrance
guard standing near a campfire glow

entered.detail: large ornate stone archway with intricate carvings marking the city entrance
green canvas awning shading a shop front
wooden ladder and scaffolding against a mud-brick building

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the protagonist running through a sunlit sandy street toward a prominent stone archway. Sparse pedestrians populate the area, including figures near the arch and a guard by a campfire. The architecture features mud-brick buildings with a green fabric awning visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy open-air market square with vendors

events.description: emerging from the archway into a wide open market square
navigating around a pack donkey carrying baskets crossing the path

agents.ego_description: running through the crowded market square, weaving between pedestrians and vendors

notable_agents.action: donkey with woven baskets walking through the market crowd
vendor in green robes standing beside a fabric stall

entered.detail: market stall with hanging fabrics and colorful goods
large yellow decorative tapestry hanging on a distant building wall
stone staircase leading to an upper level of a building

segments.scene_description: The protagonist enters a bustling open market square filled with moderate crowds. A donkey carrying baskets crosses the path, requiring navigation. Market stalls with fabrics line the left side, while a yellow tapestry decorates a distant wall. Stone stairs lead up a building on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market street with overhead fabric canopies

events.description: entering a narrow street covered by fabric canopies overhead
slight turn to avoid pedestrians in the narrow passage

agents.ego_description: running under the shaded fabric canopies through a busy commercial street

notable_agents.action: child in red vest running across the path
group of three pedestrians walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large fabric awning stretching across the street providing shade
decorative red and white pennant flags strung across the street
stall displaying clay pots and ceramic vessels

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a narrow commercial street shaded by overhead fabric canopies. The ground changes to patterned brick paving. Red and white decorative flags hang overhead. A child in a red vest runs across the path, and groups of pedestrians walk toward the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with construction scaffolding and palm trees

events.description: exiting the covered street into an open plaza area
approaching a large wooden scaffolding structure dominating the right side

agents.ego_description: running through the open plaza toward a large wooden scaffolding structure

notable_agents.action: woman in black robes walking along the right side
man in green turban conversing with another pedestrian

entered.detail: tall multi-level wooden scaffolding structure against a building
circular stone well or fountain structure in the plaza
group of palm trees providing shade in the open area

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a sunlit plaza with more palm trees visible. The character runs toward a prominent large wooden scaffolding structure on the right. A stone well sits in the distance on the left. Pedestrians in traditional attire walk through the open space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet, sunlit sandy street into the dense heart of a bustling city market before opening into a wide plaza. It begins with the protagonist running toward a prominent stone archway past mud-brick buildings and a guard by a campfire. As the character passes through the arch, the scene expands into a crowded market square filled with fabric stalls and a donkey crossing the path. The camera then shifts into a narrow commercial street shaded by overhead fabric canopies and red and white flags, where the ground transforms into patterned brick paving. Finally, the path opens up into a sunlit plaza featuring palm trees and a stone well before the character runs toward a large wooden scaffolding structure.
